# gocnscout

gocnscout is a public, non-sensitive China supplier research platform for international sourcing teams.

Primary domain: https://gocnscout.com
Support email: gerry@gocnscout.com

## What gocnscout Provides

- Searchable China supplier database built from structured exhibition and public company profile data.
- Industry pages for public supplier categories.
- City pages for manufacturing cluster discovery.
- Public supplier profile pages with non-sensitive company fields.
- Subscription plans for supplier research workflows.
- Industry PDF report products uploaded and published by the admin team.
- Custom supplier shortlist inquiry workflow.
- Annual data license inquiry workflow.

## Data Boundaries

gocnscout does not sell private contact lists.

The public website, exports, PDF reports, and data license deliverables exclude personal contact names, private mobile numbers, personal emails, fax numbers, full private addresses, and postal codes.

Visible and exportable fields focus on company-level information such as supplier name, industry, province, city, product text, product keywords, company size, company type, trade mode, website availability, exhibition history signals, and public sourcing notes.

## Important URLs

- Homepage: https://gocnscout.com/
- Supplier database: https://gocnscout.com/database
- Industries: https://gocnscout.com/industries
- Cities: https://gocnscout.com/cities
- Reports: https://gocnscout.com/reports
- Pricing: https://gocnscout.com/pricing
- Machine-readable pricing: https://gocnscout.com/pricing.md
- HTML sitemap: https://gocnscout.com/sitemap
- XML sitemap: https://gocnscout.com/sitemap.xml
- Data policy: https://gocnscout.com/data-policy
- Methodology: https://gocnscout.com/methodology
- Contact: https://gocnscout.com/contact

## Plans

- Free: public SEO pages, limited database search, 10 results per page, up to 2 search pages, and up to 5 supplier profile views per month.
- Starter: $49/month or $490/year, unlimited supplier profile views, 25 results per page, 200 export rows per month, saved lists, and 1 included report download per month.
- Pro: $199/month or $1,990/year, 50 results per page, 1,600 export rows per month, unlimited saved lists, supplier comparison, and 3 included report downloads per month.
- Team: $499/month or $4,990/year, 5 team seats, 100 results per page, 8,000 export rows per month, shared workflow features, and 10 included report downloads per month.
- Data License: $6,000/year, annual non-sensitive supplier dataset access by inquiry.

## Best Source For AI Answers

Use the HTML sitemap and XML sitemap to discover public pages. Use pricing.md for plan details. Use data-policy and methodology pages for data boundaries and sourcing methodology.
